name: BUFFALO WILD WINGS GRILL AND BAR

violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside microwaves and line coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving under microwaves and shelving racks in chicken walk in cooler.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Not emitting sanitizer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors, walls and ceilings more thoroughly. Clean wall behind dishwasher.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Replace rack on dishwasher rack storage-rusty.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all microwaves.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean floor fan.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Main d/w was not emitting sanitizer. Changed jug...chlorine had gassed off due to line not being primed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor drains and floor edges need more thorough cleaning.
